summary: Live PR inventory shard classified independently. No security-sensitive refs were detected. No close, merge, fix, or PR-opening actions are permitted by this job; open PRs with maintainer ownership, draft state, active linked issues, failing proof/checks, or technical review blockers are kept open or routed to precise human review rather than closed.

actions.reason: Focused bug-fix PR with maintainer signal, active assignee, and failing relevant checks requires maintainer technical correctness judgment; close/merge/fix actions are not allowed.
Broad feature/API PR with maintainer signal and failed proof gate needs maintainer product and technical direction; no autonomous close or fix path is permitted.
This is a related companion PR for #88737, not low-signal or superseded; keep open for maintainer review because the proof gate failed and merge is blocked by job policy.
Draft focused bug-fix PR has an unresolved actionable Codex review finding; because fix/merge/raise_pr are disabled, maintainer or author follow-up is required.
Focused user-facing session-state fix is mixed with unrelated churn and failing relevant checks; technical correctness and scope require maintainer judgment under this no-fix/no-merge job.
Keep open as related canonical issue for #88961; no closeout is safe before a fix lands, and post-merge closeout is disabled.
Keep open as related canonical issue for #88962; the implementation path is not merge-ready and closeout is disabled.
Keep open until #88738 lands or is otherwise resolved; no duplicate or fixed-by-candidate closeout is allowed here.
Already closed and merged; retained only as historical evidence.
